title: Man Holding Child Outside His Home
creator: Hajdarevic, Nedzad
subject: family life; children; military presence; residential area

title: Interior of War-Damaged Living Room

description: A domestic living room with broken windows, torn curtains, and damaged furnishings. Light enters through shattered glass, illuminating a sofa, table, and cabinet, showing signs of structural damage.
rights: cc. Nezdad Hajdarevic. All rights reserved.
